input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.7.8.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.7.8.2
            TITLE: additional interlocks may be included in the tractive system or components

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.7.8.2: Additional Interlocks may be included in the Tractive System or components
EV.7.8.2 Additional Interlocks may be included in the Tractive System or components

final_answer: Additional Interlocks may be included in the Tractive System or components
